message:
fix(control-plane): verify MAC of existing root pointer before epoch regression check

Before publishing a new root pointer, publish_root_internal now verifies
the MAC of the existing root pointer on disk. If the MAC or hash does
not match (indicating tampering), returns ROOT_SIGNING_KEY_INVALID error,
preventing an attacker from downgrading the epoch by modifying
root_pointer.json on disk to a lower epoch value that would bypass
the regression check.

New test epoch_regression_check_validates_existing_mac demonstrates
that a tampered epoch-0 root is caught before allowing publication
of a lower-epoch root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
